calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Schneider for Hadie Adams Sletner-Dwelley (Petitioner).

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes regarding attorney's fees re: accounting and the extraordinary fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Continued To Dec-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Schneider for Hadie Adams Sletner-Dwelley.

Mr. Schneider informed the Court that he filed a supplement to the accounting addressing all the issues raised by the Examiner except for the issue regarding waiver of accounting by the Beneficiary. The Court informed Counsel that the waiver by the Beneficiary/Executor or the original bank statements were needed. The matter was continued to December 8, 2008. Mr. Schneider is to submit the waiver 2 court days prior to the hearing.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Murphy.
